patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (Patient ID 104) with multiple primary lipid diagnoses: Mixed dyslipidemia (documented 06/30/2023) and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (documented 01/21/2025). Other active issues documented include Essential hypertension, benign (06/30/2023) and postoperative/unspecified anemia (06/30/2023). Major planned/performed procedures include COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY (02/21/2025). Key labs (07/03/2023): Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2. Care team includes PCP Hand, Hoyet A, MD and multiple specialists across Piedmont and Singing River. Notable data conflicts exist for date of birth and legal sex/sex assigned at birth across source documents (see conflicts).
